title: Master's Program in Chemical Engineering (English)
content:
Master's Program in Chemical Engineering (English)

Chemical Engineering (English) Master's Program About the Master's Program

What is the Chemical Engineering Master's Degree Program?

The aim of the Master's Degree Program with Chemical Engineering Thesis is to train expert engineers, academicians, and scientists who have the qualifications to develop and implement processes in which the chemical structures, physical state, or energy contents of materials are changed.

Chemical Engineering, a fertile engineering branch open to multi-faceted and interdisciplinary work, aims to meet the present and future needs of society through the scientific environment offered to students, advanced courses, and thesis studies. For this purpose, it is based on basic principles and approaches of life and engineering sciences as well as basic sciences such as mathematics, physics, and chemistry.

Who can apply to the Chemical Engineering Master's Degree Program?

Students who have graduated from the departments of

chemical engineering, chemical, materials engineering, food engineering, bioengineering, mechanical engineering, electrical and electronics engineering, molecular biology and genetics, pharmacy, biology, mathematics, physics, and engineering sciences

can apply to the program.

The teaching language of the Chemical Engineering Master's Degree Program with Thesis is Turkish. Within the framework of the quota determined by the Graduate School of Science for a Master's degree in Chemical Engineering, candidates who meet the requirements make their applications during the application period specified in the academic calendar. Candidates whose applications are accepted by the Graduate School must take the science exam on the days announced. Candidates who are successful in the science exam and meet the registration requirements for the Graduate Programs of the Graduate School of Science are registered within the quota.

What are the courses taken in the Chemical Engineering Master's Degree Program?

Within the framework of the quota determined by the Graduate School of Science for the Master's Degree in Chemical Engineering, candidates who meet the requirements make their applications during the application period specified in the academic calendar. Chemical Engineering Master's Degree Program with Thesis consists of compulsory courses that students should take and elective courses to choose from for their fields of study. Program curriculum and course contents are given in the courses section.

What are the fields of study of Chemical Engineering Graduates?

Graduates of Chemical Engineering Master's Degree have various job opportunities at home and abroad in universities, research institutions, and research and development departments of companies, senior management positions.
